layoutRegions.name: scope-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for API tokens, least-privilege tokens, review items, and overbroad grants.

layoutRegions.name: scope-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: API token inventory with owner, scopes, age, and permission posture.

layoutRegions.name: intent-and-reduction-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Owner intent, stale grants, revocation windows, and rollback-safe scope reductions.

components.name: TokenCard
components.purpose: Focusable token card with owner, scope string, age, and posture state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes least, review, and overbroad tokens
scope strings wrap without horizontal overflow

components.name: OwnerIntent
components.purpose: Owner intent, evidence, and expiry for an API token.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: ScopeReduction
components.purpose: Scope removal plan with rollback guard and probe window.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
